visual_description: A man in a dark jacket and patterned shirt stands in a dimly lit room with blinds, looking down and slightly to his left. Another man in a white shirt and tie stands behind bars, looking toward the right. The scene is enclosed, with muted lighting and a greenish tint, suggesting an institutional or confined setting.
audio_description: The audio features a single, high-pitched, breathy voice with a slow, deliberate pace, accompanied by a noticeable sigh at the end.
